_meta.description: Australian data centres and comparable large industrial electrical loads.

notes.coordinates: latitude/longitude are decimal degrees. Source sheet stored coordinates longitude-first; they have been split and corrected for Australian ranges.
notes.estimated_fields: Field names listed here had an uncertainty marker in the source (* ** *** ? + > < or 'planned'). The numeric value is the parsed figure; treat as approximate.
notes.sources: Per-field citation links. Key = field name, value = URL that the source spreadsheet hyperlinked to that specific value. `website` and `planning_url` are dedicated fields rather than entries here.
notes.loads: All load figures are in megawatts (MW). estimated_cost_m is in millions (AUD, as recorded in source).
notes.status: Normalised status word; where the source had a trailing marker the original is kept in `status_raw`.
notes.data_centres_source: Combined from the workbook's 'Sheet1' (master list) plus rows unique to the 'Commenced' tab. `source_tab` records the origin.
notes.other_loads: Not data centres: aluminium/alumina/cement/copper/other industrial loads included in the source for comparison.
